allow: PowerShell(echo "=== Qt tools in share ==="; Get-ChildItem "C:\\msys64\\ucrt64\\share\\qt6\\bin" -Name; echo "=== run qmake ==="; Set-Location "F:\\VSProject\\C++\\3rdProject"; $env:PATH = "C:\\msys64\\ucrt64\\bin;C:\\msys64\\ucrt64\\share\\qt6\\bin;$env:PATH"; & "C:\\msys64\\ucrt64\\bin\\qmake6.exe" "TankBattle.pro" -spec win32-g++ "CONFIG+=debug" "CONFIG+=qml_debug" 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\msys64\\ucrt64\\bin;C:\\msys64\\ucrt64\\share\\qt6\\bin;$env:PATH"; Start-Process "F:\\VSProject\\C++\\3rdProject\\debug\\TankBattle.exe" -PassThru | Select-Object Id, ProcessName; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; echo "Process started. Check if it's still running..."; $proc = Get-Process -Id \(Get-Process TankBattle -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Id -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { echo "TankBattle is running \(PID: $\($proc.Id\)\)"; Stop-Process $proc -Force; echo "Stopped." } else { echo "TankBattle exited already." })
